summary: Completed testing of HevaPOS Print Pending Orders Feature (Iteration 16). All 24 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified - Print button visible on each pending order with 4-column grid layout (Print/Edit/Cancel/Pay). Print functionality working - console shows '[Printer] Sending 239 bytes to Kitchen Printer (wifi)'. Printer Settings page shows multi-device WiFi tip and Bluetooth discovery in browser mode.
critical_code_review_comments: POSScreen.js Line 77: [isPrinting, setIsPrinting] = useState(false) - Duplicate print prevention state
POSScreen.js Line 80-104: sendToPrinter() helper with isPrinting check and auto-print label handling
POSScreen.js Line 108-125: printOrderReceipt() function calls printerAPI.printKitchenReceipt() and sendToPrinter()
POSScreen.js Line 748-758: Print button in 4-column grid with data-testid='print-order-{id}'
printer.js Line 54: this._printing = false - Lock to prevent duplicate prints
printer.js Line 79-83: _printing lock check in printToDevice() with 'Printer is busy' error
printer.js Line 144-162: Better Bluetooth error message mentioning WiFi for multi-device sharing
printer.js Line 330: BLE scan filter: if (!seen.has(id) && result.device.name) - filters unnamed devices
PrinterSettings.js Line 461-467: Multi-device sharing tip recommending WiFi over Bluetooth
Backend /api/print/kitchen/{order_id} returns ESC/POS commands field - WORKING
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data including 65 pending orders and Kitchen Printer (wifi, 192.168.1.100:9100, default)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified the print pending orders feature: 1) Print button visible on each pending order card with data-testid='print-order-{id}'. 2) 4-column grid layout: Print (blue), Edit (amber), Cancel (red), Pay (green). 3) isPrinting state in POSScreen prevents duplicate prints. 4) printer.js _printing lock prevents concurrent print jobs. 5) Auto-prints use 'kitchen-auto'/'customer-auto' labels and don't show toast errors. 6) Bluetooth error messages mention WiFi for multi-device sharing. 7) PrinterSettings help section has 'Sharing a printer between multiple devices?' tip. 8) BLE scan filters unnamed devices. WiFi print timeouts are EXPECTED since 192.168.1.100 is not reachable.

frontend_tests.print_button_visible: PASSED - Print button with printer icon on each pending order
frontend_tests.print_button_clickable: PASSED - Console shows '[Printer] Sending 239 bytes to Kitchen Printer (wifi)'
frontend_tests.discover_printers_dialog: PASSED - WiFi and Bluetooth tabs available
frontend_tests.bluetooth_browser_mode: PASSED - Shows 'Bluetooth requires the HevaPOS app' message
frontend_tests.multi_device_tip: PASSED - 'Sharing a printer between multiple devices?' tip visible

print_button_on_pending_orders.description: Print button visible on each pending order with data-testid='print-order-{id}'
print_button_on_pending_orders.verification: UI screenshot shows blue Print button with printer icon

duplicate_print_prevention.description: isPrinting state prevents duplicate simultaneous prints
duplicate_print_prevention.verification: Code review confirmed isPrinting check in sendToPrinter and printOrderReceipt

printer_busy_lock.description: printer.js _printing lock prevents concurrent print jobs
printer_busy_lock.verification: Code review confirmed _printing lock in printToDevice with 'Printer is busy' error

auto_print_labels.description: Auto-prints use 'kitchen-auto'/'customer-auto' labels and don't show toast errors
auto_print_labels.verification: Code review confirmed label check in sendToPrinter error handling

bluetooth_wifi_recommendation.description: Better error message when Bluetooth fails mentioning WiFi for multi-device
bluetooth_wifi_recommendation.verification: Code review confirmed busyHint message in _printBluetooth

multi_device_sharing_tip.description: PrinterSettings help section mentions WiFi for sharing printer between multiple devices
multi_device_sharing_tip.verification: UI screenshot shows 'Sharing a printer between multiple devices?' tip

ble_named_devices_only.description: BLE scan only shows named devices (no Unknown Device entries)
ble_named_devices_only.verification: Code review confirmed filter: if (!seen.has(id) && result.device.name)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Print failures are expected because test printer IPs (192.168.1.100) are not reachable from the server. Bluetooth Classic can only be tested in native Capacitor APK.
